# Real User Test Dataset

This folder contains publicly downloadable Minecraft build files collected for batch testing.

## Files

| Local file | Format | Source repository | Original path |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `casual_iron_farm_quad.schem` | `.schem` | `CasualMinecraft/casual-builds` | `farms/iron-farm-quad--casual/schematics/iron-farm-quad--casual_v1.0.schem` |
| `casual_iron_farm_single.litematic` | `.litematic` | `CasualMinecraft/casual-builds` | `farms/iron-farm-single--casual/schematics/iron-farm-single--casual_v1.0.litematic` |
| `casual_wool_farm_single.schem` | `.schem` | `CasualMinecraft/casual-builds` | `farms/wool-farm-single--casual/schematics/wool-farm-single--casual_v1.0.schem` |
| `casual_super_smelter.schem` | `.schem` | `CasualMinecraft/casual-builds` | `redstone/autoloading-super-smelter--casual/schematics/autoloading-super-smelter--casual_v1.0.schem` |
| `majorsopa_ghast_farm.litematic` | `.litematic` | `majorsopa/litematica-files` | `farms/Gnembon_Portal_Ghast_Farm.litematic` |
| `majorsopa_tree_farm.litematic` | `.litematic` | `majorsopa/litematica-files` | `farms/Tree_Farm_-_BEST_-_Spruce_Oak_Birch__Jungle.litematic` |
| `taetwomp_lobby.schem` | `.schem` | `taetwomp/MinecraftBuildData` | `Lobby For Death Towers/Lobby.schem` |
| `taetwomp_wibbly_witches.litematic` | `.litematic` | `taetwomp/MinecraftBuildData` | `Wibbly Witches Diamond Fire Stuff/Wibbly Witches Build.litematic` |

## Notes

- The selection mixes `.schem` and `.litematic` inputs.
- The builds include farms, redstone, and lobby-style structures.
- Source files remain subject to the original repositories' licenses and usage terms.
